text_original: conversation length is easy to keep up with. descriptions are good. can't think of issues with characters remembering history. fun app
text_zh: 对话长度很容易保持。描写很棒。想不到角色记忆历史方面有什么问题。很有趣的应用。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is fantastic to hear that you are enjoying the descriptions and that our characters are keeping up with your stories so well. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going! If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！很高兴听到您喜欢这些描述，并且我们的角色能如此出色地跟上您的故事。您的支持是驱动我们前进的动力！如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您玩得开心！
